build.beforeBuildCommand: bazelisk build //third-party/doltlite:sqlite3 && pnpm --dir ui install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm --dir ui build && bazelisk build //frankweiler/backend/sync:frankweiler_sync_bin && d="$(bazelisk info workspace)/frankweiler/tauri/binaries" && mkdir -p "$d" && cp -f "$(bazelisk info bazel-bin)/frankweiler/backend/sync/frankweiler_sync_bin" "$d/frankweiler-sync" && chmod u+w "$d/frankweiler-sync" && { [ -z "${APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY:-}" ] || codesign --force --options runtime --timestamp --sign "$APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY" "$d/frankweiler-sync"; }
